The '''tandem X-wing starfighter''' was a modified two-seat version of [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom's]] more common [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing]].

==Characteristics==
In addition to its larger hull and expanded cockpit, it was equipped with seven sublight engines rather than the standard X-wing's four, and had additional armor on the forward hull.<ref name="TBH" /> It mounted armament similar to the standard X-wing.<ref name="CE25" />

==History==
The tandem X-wing was a custom project abandoned on [[Baramorra]] by the individual who commissioned it. It was acquired by [[Kir Kanos]] under his [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] guise of Kenix Kil. Kanos used the ship to leave the planet, abandoning the [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray Blastboat]] in which he arrived.<ref name="TBH" /> Kanos took the ship to [[Genon]] to infiltrate the organization of [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].<ref name="CE21">[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]]</ref>

[[Tav Kennede]] subsequently acquired the ship and used it to fly to [[Xo]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] to [[Mission to Xo|rescue]] [[Kir Kanos]] and [[Mirith Sinn]] from the [[Zanibar]]. The same fighter was flown soon afterward by Kennede and Sinn as part of a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Attack on Grappa the Hutt's fortress|assault]] against [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] fortress on [[Genon]].<ref name="CE25" /> After his [[Battle of Ord Cantrell|execution]] of [[Xandel Carivus]], Kanos used the fighter to escape the New Republic fleet.<ref name="CE26">[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 6|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 6]]</ref>
